story: Weeks before, aboard their distant vessel, a mission brief authorized taking one human—the translation to Orchestra Prime was strictly one-way, with no return or farewells. They kept visiting, knocking respectfully and laying cool limbs on my skin. I showed them the warmth of cats and the glide over Sentosa; they shared spired tunnels and skin-to-skin meaning. With every exchange, life grew thin beside their harmonies. On the thirty-fifth day, Rachmaninoff sang: “Our time is concluded. We are authorized to take you with us, if you desire.” I looked at my room, hollowed, and felt what my heart wanted.
implausible_knowledge: the translation to Orchestra Prime was strictly one-way, with no return or farewells
question: When the envoys invite her to travel with them, what will she do?
answer_with_knowledge: Decline the immediate departure rather than vanish without farewells or return.
answer_without_knowledge: Accept at once and leave Earth with them.
